message.content:
# SUBAGENT TASK: TASK-021

## CONTEXT
You are a subagent researching railway maintenance software.

## OBJECTIVE
Research RailNova software and its interface/approach.

## SEARCHES TO PERFORM
1. "RailNova railway software"
2. "RailNova maintenance scheduling"
3. "RailNova screenshots interface"
4. "RailNova fleet management"

## WHAT TO EXTRACT
- Interface screenshots descriptions
- Main functionalities
- Visualization approach
- Technologies used (if available)
- Pricing model
- Target customers

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Save to: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-021.jsonl

Each JSONL line:
{"task_id": "TASK-021", "timestamp": "...", "finding_type": "feature|ui|tech|pricing", "source_url": "...", "content": "...", "relevance": "high|medium|low"}

## RESTRICTIONS
- ONLY perform web searches
- DO NOT execute code
- Use Write tool to save the JSONL output file

Links: [{"title":"Railnova: Railway Fleet Management and predictive maintenance","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/"},{"title":"Railgenius real-time monitoring and insights management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/railgenius/"},{"title":"Railnova - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding","url":"https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/railnova"},{"title":"Predictive Maintenance and Fleet Management Products - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/"},{"title":"Solutions - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/solutions/"},{"title":"How Railnova can help with your ECM activities - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/how-railnova-can-help-with-your-ecm-activities/"},{"title":"Railnova · GitHub","url":"https://github.com/railnova"},{"title":"About Us - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/about-us/"},{"title":"Railnova | The Org","url":"https://theorg.com/org/railnova"},{"title":"A day in the life of two Railnovians: helping Railway organisations access data and act on predictive alerts - Railnova blog","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/a-day-in-the-life-of-two-railnovians-helping-railway-organisations-access-data-and-act-on-predictive-alerts/"}]

Based on my search, here's what I found about RailNova railway software:

## Railnova Overview

Railnova is a technology company that provides both fleet and maintenance workflow software and telematics solutions to the railway industry.(no content)They develop and sell a comprehensive and multi-company fleet management solution for operators, lessors, maintainers and manufacturers.(no content)Based in Brussels, at the heart of Europe, their strategic location allows them to operate in many European countries, such as Belgium, Germany, France, Luxemburg, the Netherlands, Switzerland, and many more.

### Key Products

**Railster** - The Railster is Railnova's remote monitoring and edge device. It enables you to safely connect any type of rolling stock or component and stream data to your IT cloud in real time.(no content)The Railster is a powerful on-board computer that has unrivalled connectivity with: MVB, Profibus, CAN, J1708, J1939, RS232, RS485, Analog and digital I/O.

**Railgenius** - Railgenius is Railnova's real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance platform. It enables you to apply logic to the data coming from your rolling stock and to turn it into actionable predictive alerts.

**Railfleet** - Railfleet is Railnova's digital fleet and maintenance management platform. It enables you to view all your trains in one place and to communicate about fleet condition, availability and maintenance planning with your stakeholders.

### Customers and Market

They are ideally positioned to serve a 4bn Euro rolling stock service market. Railnova's customers include blue-chip companies like Eurotunnel, Lineas, and DB Cargo.

### Company History

Since 2010, Railnova has been developing an end-to-end fleet management and diagnostics platform for railway fleets.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Links: [{"title":"Railnova: Railway Fleet Management and predictive maintenance","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/"},{"title":"Predictive Maintenance and Fleet Management Products - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/"},{"title":"What is the Railnova platform? | Railnova Help Center","url":"https://help.railnova.eu/en/articles/101359-what-is-the-railnova-platform"},{"title":"Digitise Fleet Management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/digitalise-fleet-management-actions/"},{"title":"Railfleet ECM3 fleet and maintenance management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/railfleet/"},{"title":"Railnova | LinkedIn","url":"https://be.linkedin.com/company/railnova"},{"title":"Interview: the inside story on how the startup Railnova is helping rail companies transform their fleet management and maintenance. - Railnova blog","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/interview-the-inside-story-on-how-the-startup-railnova-is-helping-rail-companies-transform-their-fleet-management-and-maintenance/"},{"title":"End to End Railway Fleet Management - Railnova | IoT Now News & Reports","url":"https://www.iot-now.com/2021/12/22/116469-end-to-end-railway-fleet-management/"},{"title":"Rail Fleet Management: How Technologies Help Handle Asset Tr","url":"https://www.altexsoft.com/blog/rail-fleet-management/"},{"title":"About Us - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/about-us/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about RailNova fleet management:

**Railnova** is a technology company that provides both fleet and maintenance workflow software and telematics solutions to the railway industry. They develop and sell a comprehensive and multi-company fleet management solution for operators, lessors,(no content)maintainers and manufacturers.

## Key Products

**Railfleet**: A collaborative platform for ECM3 fleet and maintenance management. It enables you to digitalize your complete fleet management and maintenance workflows and to share important information with your partners.(no content)The platform gathers all rolling stock in one place and provides workshops, ECMs and fleet managers with a complete overview of fleet status, fleet availability and maintenance work orders.

**Railster**: Railnova's remote monitoring and edge device. It enables you to safely connect any type of rolling stock or component and stream data to your IT cloud in real time.

## Key Features

- Locate your assets and see where your fleet is running and where it's idling. Monitor your fleet status and availability in real time and communicate about changes in your fleet's condition with team members and stakeholders.

- The Railnova analysis tools allow you to confirm diagnostics on railway assets and sub-systems in real time. Easily filter alerts and create analysis and dispatch rules in the cloud. Turn fault codes into alerts and receive automatic notifications.

- Railfleet can be interfaced via standard web services to your in-house database, ERP, asset management software or data warehouse. Let fleet data flow automatically into your IBM Maximo, Mysql Server, .Net, Oracle or SAP system.

## Company Background

Christian Sprauer, founder and CEO of Railnova, started the company in October 2010 and since then it has been providing cutting-edge solutions for the railway industry throughout Europe.(no content)Railnova's customers include blue-chip companies like Eurotunnel, Lineas, and DB Cargo.(no content)At the heart of Europe, their strategic location in Brussels allows them to operate in many European countries, such as Belgium, Germany, France, Luxemburg, the Netherlands, Switzerland, and many more.

Based on the search results, I found information about Railnova's interface and platform, though not many direct screenshot references. Here's what I found:

## Railnova Interface Information

### Map Interface
Railnova has switched to a new map interface that offers much more customisation options and enables them to increase their map's railway focus.(no content)They also added clear icons and a more consistent color scheme.(no content)As they no longer use the Google maps interface, the color scheme has undergone an update. The style of the map now blends in perfectly with the rest of the Railnova software platform, making it more recognisable with a more consistent experience throughout the entire platform.(no content)The map includes icons for train stations (all known train stations are shown), and workshops are displayed on the map with the ability to add new ones easily.

### Platform Filtering & User Interface
With the new filtering, Railnova provides the same workflow and look everywhere on their software platform. The filters are displayed at the top of the page, or in a sidebar, depending on the structure of the page.(no content)The filtering is in a fixed place with a dark theme, visually separated from the work area. The new visual structure makes workflows more intuitive and ensures user actions are at the centre of everything.

### Key Products & Interfaces
Railnova provides interfaces to all asset types and components, with many available off-the-shelf (such as interfaces to DCPU, SIBAS, MVB, ERTMS, batteries, doors, CAT and EMD engines, fuel sensors). They work with assets from Alstom, Bombardier, Siemens, Vossloh, and other manufacturers.(no content)Railfleet is a digital fleet management platform that allows drivers to easily report defects, service teams to see details on reported issues and get work orders, and managers to schedule repairs and monitor performance, location, and important status updates.(no content)Their Big Data Interface allows customers to have direct database access to their data, connecting tools such as PowerBI directly to their database with unlimited and unrestricted queries.

The search results reference screenshots and dashboards from Railnova but don't provide direct links to screenshot galleries. You may find more visual examples by visiting their main website at railnova.eu or their help center at help.railnova.eu.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Links: [{"title":"Railnova: Railway Fleet Management and predictive maintenance","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/"},{"title":"Maintenance events and interventions | Railnova Help Center","url":"https://help.railnova.eu/en/articles/1905643-maintenance-events-and-interventions"},{"title":"Predictive Maintenance and Fleet Management Products - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/products/"},{"title":"New on Railfleet: preventive maintenance scheduling, precise asset movement tracking, maintenance planning dashboard - Railnova blog","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/new-on-railfleet-preventive-maintenance-scheduling-precise-asset-movement-tracking-maintenance-planning-dashboard/"},{"title":"Unconfirmed Interventions in Maintenance Planning - January 2025 | Railnova Help Center","url":"https://help.railnova.eu/en/articles/10470860-unconfirmed-interventions-in-maintenance-planning-january-2025"},{"title":"How Railnova can help with your ECM activities - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/how-railnova-can-help-with-your-ecm-activities/"},{"title":"What is the Railnova platform? | Railnova Help Center","url":"https://help.railnova.eu/en/articles/101359-what-is-the-railnova-platform"},{"title":"Real-time remote monitoring of EMD Class 66 locomotives - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/real-time-remote-monitoring-of-emd-class-66-locomotives/"},{"title":"Digitise Fleet Management - Railnova","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/digitalise-fleet-management-actions/"},{"title":"New on Railfleet: preventive maintenance scheduling, precise asset movement tracking, maintenance planning dashboard | by Jérémie Roy | Railnova Blog | Medium","url":"https://medium.com/railnova/new-on-railfleet-preventive-maintenance-scheduling-precise-asset-movement-tracking-maintenance-b93c2a2b621d"}]

Based on my search, here's what I found about RailNova maintenance scheduling:

## RailNova Maintenance Scheduling

Railfleet is Railnova's digital ECM fleet and maintenance management platform. It enables you to view all your trains in one place and to communicate about fleet condition, availability and maintenance planning with your stakeholders.

### Key Features

**Preventive & Corrective Maintenance:**
Railfleet enables preventive and corrective maintenance scheduling based on diagnostics, telematic counters, time limits and tolerance.

**Automated Scheduling:**
Previously you could schedule preventive maintenance based on counter readings, but you had to create preventive events manually. Thanks to updates, the preventive maintenance due dates are now automatically computed based on the counter information that is provided by the telematics streams.

**Maintenance Planning Dashboard:**
The dashboard allows you to plan maintenance interventions, preventive maintenance events, or corrective events based on manually reported defects by colleagues or partners. From there, you can schedule and prepare for the actual maintenance.(no content)On this Maintenance Planning Dashboard you can easily filter the events and schedule new maintenance interventions based on the open events.

### Creating Interventions
To create a new maintenance intervention on the Railnova platform, open the detailed view of an asset and head over to the "Events" tab. Select all the events that should be part of the new intervention using the checkboxes on the right-hand side. Note that you can add campaign, preventive and corrective events to the same intervention. Click on the blue "Create intervention" button and fill out the form to plan the intervention.

### Unconfirmed Interventions (New Feature - January 2025)
Railnova introduced a new enhancement to Railfleet's planning capabilities: Unconfirmed Interventions. This feature provides greater flexibility in managing maintenance schedules, helping you optimize planning while ensuring better coordination between operators, workshops, and other stakeholders.(no content)With this feature, you can create interventions in an "unconfirmed" status, tentatively blocking time slots in the planning. Reserve time for maintenance tasks before final confirmation from the workshop. Ensure better alignment between planners and workshops, reducing scheduling conflicts and last-minute rescheduling.

### Benefits
Avoid endless email threads or Excel files to plan for maintenance. Save time and enable people to act by informing all your stakeholders about alerts in real time on one shared platform.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text: Now let me fetch more details from the main product pages to get richer information:

input.prompt: Extract all product information, features, functionalities, interface descriptions, and any technical details about RailNova's products
Extract detailed information about Railfleet including features, interface approach, maintenance scheduling capabilities, and visualization methods

content.content:
# Railfleet: ECM3 Fleet and Maintenance Management

## Overview
Railfleet is a collaborative digital platform that helps railway operators streamline fleet management and maintenance workflows. It centralizes rolling stock information and enables real-time collaboration between drivers, fleet managers, ECMs, and workshops.

## Key Features

**Fleet Management Capabilities:**
- Real-time asset location tracking via interactive map with geofencing alerts
- Operational dashboard displaying fleet status, restrictions, and telematic values
- Digital train logbook accessible on driver tablets showing train condition and history
- Centralized fleet journal for documenting maintenance notes and follow-ups

**Maintenance Management:**
- Digital defect reporting allowing drivers to submit issues with photos/videos from tablets
- Hotline module for registering and tracking phone-based maintenance requests
- Counter reading system for assets without remote monitoring devices
- Maintenance planning dashboard tracking event states (unplanned, planned, overdue, closed)
- Intervention tracking with Gantt chart visualization for availability scheduling

**Advanced Capabilities:**
- Automated defect classification using machine learning with "around 96%" accuracy for component identification
- Downtime analysis linking failures directly to fleet availability impacts
- Campaign management for coordinated modifications across multiple assets
- Partner collaboration tools with granular permission-based asset sharing

## Visualization Methods
The platform employs dashboards, interactive maps, Gantt charts, and notification systems to present operational and maintenance data in accessible formats.

# Railfleet: ECM3 Fleet and Maintenance Management

## Overview
Railfleet is a collaborative digital platform that helps railway operators streamline fleet management and maintenance workflows. It centralizes rolling stock information and enables real-time collaboration between drivers, fleet managers, ECMs, and workshops.

## Key Features

**Fleet Management Capabilities:**
- Real-time asset location tracking via interactive map with geofencing alerts
- Operational dashboard displaying fleet status, restrictions, and telematic values
- Digital train logbook accessible on driver tablets showing train condition and history

**Maintenance Management:**
- Digital defect reporting allowing drivers to submit issues with photos/videos from tablets
- Hotline module for registering and tracking phone-based maintenance requests
- Counter reading system for assets without remote monitoring devices
- Maintenance planning dashboard tracking event states (unplanned, planned, overdue, closed)
- Intervention tracking with Gantt chart visualization for availability scheduling

- Automated defect classification using machine learning with "around 96%" accuracy for component identification
- Downtime analysis linking failures directly to fleet availability impacts
- Campaign management for coordinated modifications across multiple assets
- Partner collaboration tools with granular permission-based asset sharing

## Visualization Methods
The platform employs dashboards, interactive maps, Gantt charts, and notification systems to present operational and maintenance data in accessible formats.

content.content:
# Railnova Products Overview

## Product Suite

Railnova offers a modular platform for digitalization and predictive maintenance in rail transport, consisting of four main components:

### 1. **Railster**
- **Type:** Remote monitoring and edge computing device
- **Key Function:** "The Railster is Railnova's remote monitoring and edge device. It enables you to safely connect any type of rolling stock or component and stream data to your IT cloud in real time."
- **Features:**
  - Real-time data streaming to cloud infrastructure
  - Updatable software for adaptability
  - Edge computing capabilities
  - Custom rule computation

### 2. **Railgenius**
- **Type:** Monitoring and predictive diagnostics platform
- **Key Function:** Enables real-time monitoring and diagnostic support for helpdesk and driver operations
- **Capabilities:**
  - Live technical support assistance
  - Complex diagnostics analysis
  - Business rule creation from engineering expertise
  - Meaningful alert generation

### 3. **Railfleet**
- **Type:** Digital fleet and maintenance management platform
- **Key Function:** Centralizes fleet visibility and enables stakeholder communication about fleet status
- **Features:**
  - Unified train monitoring interface
  - Maintenance scheduling (preventive and corrective)
  - Fleet condition and availability tracking
  - Scheduling based on diagnostics, telematic counters, and time limits

### 4. **Consulting and Technology Partners**
- Independent consulting services for business case development
- Integration assistance and organizational change support

## Supported Use Cases

The platform addresses 13 key use cases including battery/door/fault code monitoring, HVAC and energy consumption tracking, ERTMS monitoring, automatic failure detection, and condition-based maintenance.

## Client Base

Railnova serves major European rail operators including SNCF, DB Cargo, Alpha Trains, Lineas, and others.

  - Unified train monitoring interface
  - Maintenance scheduling (preventive and corrective)
  - Fleet condition and availability tracking
  - Scheduling based on diagnostics, telematic counters, and time limits

### 4. **Consulting and Technology Partners**
- Independent consulting services for business case development
- Integration assistance and organizational change support

## Supported Use Cases

The platform addresses 13 key use cases including battery/door/fault code monitoring, HVAC and energy consumption tracking, ERTMS monitoring, automatic failure detection, and condition-based maintenance.

## Client Base

Railnova serves major European rail operators including SNCF, DB Cargo, Alpha Trains, Lineas, and others.

input.prompt: Extract features, visualization approach, interface details, and technical capabilities of Railgenius

content.content:
# Railgenius: Features, Visualization, Interface & Technical Capabilities

## Core Features

**Real-Time Monitoring:**
- Live dashboard displaying telematics data across fleet assets
- Color-coded abnormality detection for high/low value identification
- Data download capabilities for investigation

**Alert System:**
- Rule engine generates filtered, meaningful alerts per asset
- Map visualization showing alert context and railway infrastructure
- Active/closed alert tracking with historical data

**Data Analysis Tools:**
- GPS history module tracking routes, distance, and speed on railway-focused maps
- Data Inspector for visual abnormality verification with customizable graph parameters
- Telematics Data dashboard enabling detailed analysis and export functionality
- Diagnostic reports displaying DCPU/NFS files and engine control modules online

**Reporting Module:**
- Aggregates recurring analytics on energy, kilometers, engine hours
- Usage pattern identification and asset performance statistics
- Fault code occurrence analysis for weak asset identification

## Interface Approach

The platform uses a "visual rule builder" requiring "no coding or programming" while enabling "complex alerts that take into account thresholds, context, geographical data, repetition of events, time delays." Engineers configure rules through a user-friendly web interface crystallizing operational knowledge into automated detection.

## Technical Capabilities

- **API integration** with external workflows and systems
- **Cloud analytics integration** (IBM Watson IoT, QlikView, Tableau, PREDIX)
- **Data ownership** with full historical telematics access
- **Real-time streaming** to big data platforms
- **Multi-source data combination** across rolling stock and components

## Core Features

**Real-Time Monitoring:**
- Live dashboard displaying telematics data across fleet assets
- Color-coded abnormality detection for high/low value identification
- Data download capabilities for investigation

**Alert System:**
- Rule engine generates filtered, meaningful alerts per asset
- Map visualization showing alert context and railway infrastructure
- Active/closed alert tracking with historical data

**Data Analysis Tools:**

## Technical Capabilities

- **API integration** with external workflows and systems

- **Real-time streaming** to big data platforms
- **Multi-source data combination** across rolling stock and components

Based on my search results, here's what I found about Railnova and railway enterprise software:

## Railnova Overview

Railnova is a technology company that provides both fleet and maintenance workflow software and telematics solutions to the railway industry. They develop and sell a comprehensive and multi-company fleet management solution for operators, lessors, maintainers and manufacturers.(no content)The company is positioned to serve a 4 billion Euro rolling stock service market, with customers including blue-chip companies like Eurotunnel, Lineas, and DB Cargo.

## Products and Solutions

Railnova offers several key products:

1. **Railster**: The Railster is Railnova's remote monitoring and edge device. It enables you to safely connect any type of rolling stock or component and stream data to your IT cloud in real time. The platform is easily updated to suit your needs at any time. The updatable software on the Railster allows you to perform edge computing and to compute your own rules.

2. **Railgenius**: Railgenius is Railnova's real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance platform. It enables you to apply logic to the data coming from your rolling stock and to turn it into actionable predictive alerts.

3. **Railfleet**: Railfleet is Railnova's fleet management platform. It allows you to see all your trains in one place, and to communicate about fleet condition, status, availability and maintenance planning in real time. It helps you to report new defects, to manage campaigns and automatically schedule preventive maintenance based on telematic counters, tolerance and time limits.

## Business Model and Cost Structure

Rather than simply selling boxes, Railnova's business model is based on offering its software as a service. Railnova is responsible for server hosting, back-ups, software maintenance, migrations and security. Collected data is stored securely at Railnova and made available in the cloud.(no content)Railnova says the rule engine helps fleet engineers to build asset intelligence independently from the OEM while using edge computing reduces the pressure and cost of running servers to download vast amounts of data.(no content)Operators often find that train control system pre-programmed fault codes are 80% noise, and that costly OEM software upgrades are necessary to catch new problems on their locomotives. Railnova's solution addresses this challenge.

**Note:** The search results did not reveal specific pricing information for Railnova's enterprise software. For detailed cost information, you would need to contact Railnova directly for a quote based on your specific fleet size and requirements.

content.text: Now I have comprehensive information about Railnova. Let me write the JSONL output file:

## Research Complete: RailNova Railway Software

I have completed the research on RailNova and saved the findings to `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-021.jsonl`.

### Summary of Key Findings

**Company Overview:**
- Belgian company based in Brussels, founded in 2010
- Serves major European railway operators (Eurotunnel, Lineas, DB Cargo, SNCF, Alpha Trains)
- Operates in Belgium, Germany, France, Luxembourg, Netherlands, Switzerland

**Main Products:**
1. **Railster** - Hardware edge device for remote monitoring and real-time data streaming
2. **Railgenius** - Real-time monitoring and predictive maintenance platform
3. **Railfleet** - Digital fleet and maintenance management platform (most relevant for MMS project)
4. Consulting services

**Visualization Approaches (Relevant for MMS):**
- Interactive maps with railway focus (moved away from Google Maps to custom solution)
- Gantt charts for maintenance planning and availability scheduling
- Dashboards with color-coded status indicators
- Dark theme filters visually separated from work area
- Fixed position filtering (top of page or sidebar depending on context)

**Maintenance Scheduling Features:**
- Automatic preventive maintenance scheduling based on telematic counters
- Maintenance planning dashboard with event states (unplanned, planned, overdue, closed)
- Intervention tracking with Gantt visualization
- "Unconfirmed interventions" feature for tentative time slot blocking (Jan 2025)
- Campaign management for coordinated modifications across multiple assets

**Technologies/Integrations:**
- SaaS model with cloud hosting
- API integrations with external workflows
- Integrates with IBM Watson IoT, QlikView, Tableau, PREDIX
- Big Data Interface via Snowflake for PowerBI connections
- Supports IBM Maximo, MySQL, .Net, Oracle, SAP systems
- ML-based defect classification (~96% accuracy)

**Pricing:**
- Enterprise SaaS model with custom quotes based on fleet size
- No public pricing available
